framework.name: FGA as Stateful Capability Attenuation
framework.description: Auth0 FGA (based on Google Zanzibar) moves delegation state out of the token and into a centralized relationship graph. Agents validate permissions per-hop against FGA, enabling progressive narrowing without new token formats. Clever workaround for OAuth's offline-attenuation gap.
framework.raw_quote: This stateful context lives in FGA, not in the token, enabling capability-style attenuation without requiring new token formats.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
